message:
feat: add agent tools dir to PATH, strengthen tool-creation prompt

- LocalExecutionEnvironment.addToPath() prepends dirs to PATH for
  all exec_command calls
- Agent.run() adds its genome tools/ dir to PATH so saved scripts
  are directly executable without full paths
- Updated workspace encouragement: prefer writing tools over ad-hoc
  commands, even for one-time tasks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
